subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who hath sent down the verses in truth, wherein lieth that which openeth the gates of Paradise and causeth the breezes of grace to waft [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فسبحان الذی نزل الایات بالحق و فیها ما یفتح ابواب الفردوس و تهب نسائم الفضل
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @thankfulness; gratitude, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
